form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (22.92) over 400m at this track. Has a win and a minor from two fresh up runs. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (22.92) over 400m at this track. Has a win and a minor from two fresh up runs. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 400m. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 400m. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn galloped onto the hind quarters.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fifth (17.52) at Richmond Straight. Aided by a low draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fifth (17.52) at Richmond Straight. Aided by a low draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 22.46 over the 400m trip. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 22.46 over the 400m trip. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide rounding the turn into the front straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Kicked off career from box 6 at this course and distance and immediately opened winning account, scoring by 2.5 lengths in 22.24. Back in great order and makes plenty of appeal again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Kicked off career from box 6 at this course and distance and immediately opened winning account, scoring by 2.5 lengths in 22.24. Back in great order and makes plenty of appeal again.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths third at Bulli but did record a fast 22.49 over the 400m trip. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths third at Bulli but did record a fast 22.49 over the 400m trip. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

form.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Richmond Straight but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at Richmond Straight and clocking a solid 17.69 over the 324m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to recent best times.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame last time at Richmond Straight but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5 at Richmond Straight and clocking a solid 17.69 over the 324m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to recent best times.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 400m at this track beaten 2.5 lengths (22.64) behind Layton Magic in a Grade 5 on April 13. Thereabouts of late and can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 400m at this track beaten 2.5 lengths (22.64) behind Layton Magic in a Grade 5 on April 13. Thereabouts of late and can feature with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slipped on the mat and lost ground in the early stages of the race.
